chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1445 of 2018 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to maintainability of petition 2. For hearing of Misc. No.6155/2018 28.03.2025 Mr. Shahbakht Pirzada, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Javed Ali Sangi, advocate for respondent Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Per learned counsel, show cause notice has been impugned herein, however, the same shall be contested before the issuing authority. Learned counsel seeks that the same be adjudicated vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending the aforesaid no coercive action be taken there against. Learned counsel for respondent articulates no cavil in such regard and states that the petition be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
